steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which coral is least suited to a full migration to the mesophotic zone (which begins at 30 m). The coral farthest from reaching 30 m — the one with the lowest maximum depth — would be the least capable of making that migration.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — coral with a maximum depth of 25 m: closer to 30 m than Plerogyra discus; not the most limited. ✗
  • Choice B — Plerogyra discus (maximum depth 15 m): the shallowest maximum depth among the choices — the farthest from the 30 m mesophotic threshold. ✓
  • Choice C — coral with a maximum depth of 40 m: already reaches the mesophotic zone. ✗
  • Choice D — coral cited by minimum depth: minimum depth shows where the coral starts, not how deep it can go — irrelevant to reaching the mesophotic zone. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
